name: 🐾Squeak!🐾
description:
You find a strange critter while walking back home...

I saw this thing on Tumblr and thought it would make a nice bot! This is tested! However, if any errors do occur, please let me know and I’ll try to fix it! :]

The PFP wasn’t made by me nor is it any way mine! The person who made the PFP is @capnofake on Tumblr!

Don’t do anything freaky with this thing! Any creepy comments about doing something inappropriate with the critter is going to either get deleted or reported! >:[
creator: The_Final_Braincell
